name: subtext
description: Review Subtext session recordings and manage privacy rules

interface.longDescription: Review Subtext session recordings and manage privacy rules from your coding agent. Pull a session URL to walk through what a user did, verify a flow, or summarize a capture; detect PII and propose, create, and promote element-block, URL, and network privacy rules.
defaultPrompt: Review this Subtext session and tell me what the user did: <url>
Find PII in our recent sessions and propose privacy rules to block it.
